content: Supabase Realtime Broadcast is a direct, server-mediated pub/sub channel (<50ms typical latency) suited to app-level events like 'bet accepted'; Postgres Changes (logical replication based, 50-200ms) is DB-row-driven and fires on any row change, which is the wrong signal for financial events since it can fire mid-transaction. Pusher/Socket.io are viable alternatives but add a second vendor/infra surface when Supabase is already providing DB/Auth.
